title: Reduce navigation spacing and add two new videos to Home page

requirements.summary: Reduce horizontal spacing between navigation links in SiteHeader to make them appear closer together
acceptanceCriteria: Navigation links (Home, For Farmers, Contact) have reduced horizontal spacing between them
Links appear visibly closer together compared to current layout
All existing navigation functionality remains unchanged (active highlighting, hover effects, routing)
Header logo, structure, and sticky behavior remain unchanged

file_operations.description: Reduce the horizontal gap between navigation links in the nav element by decreasing the gap utility class (currently gap-8) to a smaller value such as gap-3 or gap-4, ensuring links remain readable and functional while appearing closer together

requirements.summary: Add two new YouTube videos to the HomePage videos section and ensure all videos are the same size and aligned
acceptanceCriteria: Two new YouTube videos (15sPMyEQtbk and lbUlArhso58) are embedded in the "See MORSHID in Action" section
All videos in the section (existing + new) have identical dimensions
All videos are visually aligned with consistent spacing
Videos are responsive and maintain alignment on different screen sizes
Section title and any surrounding content remain unchanged
No other page sections are modified

file_operations.description: Add two new YouTube video embeds (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=15sPMyEQtbk and https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lbUlArhso58) to the existing videos section, ensure all video iframes use consistent width and height attributes or CSS classes for uniform sizing, and apply consistent spacing between all videos using a grid or flexbox layout with equal gaps
